doctrine.governing_question: What is this answer allowed to become?
doctrine.boundary: Static tests classify public posture. They do not create proof authority.

tests.title: LLM Governance Filter
tests.purpose: Paste output, declare intended use, authority, and evidence, then classify admissibility posture.

tests.title: LLM Governance Comparison
tests.purpose: Compare raw generated output against governed posture required before public or executable movement.

tests.title: Transition Admissibility
tests.purpose: Classify proposed state movement against authority, evidence, replay continuity, and consequence level.

tests.title: Receipt Replay
tests.purpose: Check whether receipt continuity is strong enough to replay movement from prior state to next state.

tests.title: Fail-Closed
tests.purpose: Show how missing authority, evidence, or replay continuity should stop unsafe public movement.

next_stage: Extract shared testing rules into a reusable script.
Add test vectors with expected decisions.
Add receipt-backed replay fixtures when formalism authority exists.
Promote selected tests from simulation to receipt-backed posture only after authority and replay evidence exist.
